caption: The video begins with a wide global view of Earth, centered on North America and the Pacific Ocean. The perspective then rapidly zooms in, transitioning from a satellite view of the planet to a closer aerial view of a green and brown mountainous landscape. As the zoom continues, the scenery shifts to an urban environment, revealing a sprawling city with various low-rise and mid-rise buildings nestled against a backdrop of hills. The final view is a close-up aerial shot of a city center, highlighting several large, modern architectural structures, including a prominent multi-story hotel or office complex with a light-colored facade and a curved building adjacent to it. There are no people, on-screen text, or logos visible in any of the frames. The sequence depicts a seamless transition from a planetary scale down to a specific city street level.
